name: LinkedIn Ads
description: LinkedIn Ads (Insight Tag) is a conversion tracking and retargeting platform for LinkedIn advertising campaigns. The Insight Tag is a JavaScript snippet placed on websites to track conversions, build audience segments, and measure the effectiveness of LinkedIn ad campaigns.
advantages: Professional audience targeting (job title, industry, company)
Conversion tracking for LinkedIn ad campaigns
GDPR and CCPA compliant with built-in consent controls
disadvantages: Premium pricing compared to other ad platforms
Smaller audience pool than Google or Meta
Higher cost per click for competitive industries
Requires LinkedIn Ads account to use effectively
